titleStmt.title: SII 11.14: original edition by C. R. Krishnamacharlu, R. S. Panchamukhi, N. Lakshminaraya Rao and H. K. Narasimhaswami
No. 14. (B.K. No. 246 of 1928-29). SISUVINAHAḶḶI, NAVALGUND TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE HANUMANTADĒVA TEMPLE.

summary.p: The record which is dated in Śaka 793, Khara, Phālguṇa, śu. (mistake for ba.) 1 Wednesday (mistake for Friday), Hasta (= A.D. 872, February 29, day following a lunar eclipse) refers itself to the reign of Amōghavarsha I. Dēvaṇayya, the Governor of Beḷvola Three Hundred, is stated to have exempted the Fifty Mahājanas of Sisuḷahāḻu from taxes on ghee. The Mahājanas are described as being equal to Brahmā in Śruti, Smṛiti, Vyākaraṇa, Kāvya, Nāṭikā, Tarka and Āgama and are stated to have obtained the village as a gift during the Chāḷukya times (Saḷuki-rājya).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastyamōghavarṣa śrī pṛthuvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramē
śvara paramabhaṭararā rājyamuttarōttara mabhivṛddhige
saluttire śrī madamōghavarṣadēva sādapaṁka
jabhramara visiṣṭajanāśrayaṁ śrīmaddēvaṇayyaṁ be
ḷvolamūnūṟuma nāḷuttuṁ sakanṛpakāḷātītasaṁvatsaraṅga ḷeḻnūṟa
tombattamūṟaneya kharamemba variṣaṁ pravarttise
phālguṇamāsa śuddhapakṣa pratipada tithi butha
vāra hastanakṣatradandu nṛpatuṅgarājamandirāṁ
gaṇado ḷdēvaṇayya śarvvatīrtthōdakasnānapavi
ttrīkritagātraṁ svakīya kannerāsiyoḷsōmagraha
ṇado ḷsisuḷahāḻayvadiṁbaru mahājanama nava
dhārisi śrutiyoḷviśruta visva
smṛtiyoḷvyākaraṇa kāvyanāṭika tarkkasthitiyoḷsarvvā
gamadoḷcaturmmūkha pratimarayvadiṁbarvviprar . mo
dalo ḷsisūḷahāḻaṁ viditaśrīsaḷukirājya doḷpaḍedu
mahāsadamalasarvvakritugaḷa nudārataramāge bēḷpa
viprōttamaraṁ . kareyisi pādaprakṣāḷanapūrbbakaṁ
sahiraṇyantuppadeṟeya nuḻidōnellā kālakka(ṁ) mida nara
saru mūruṁ kādo ḍaśvamēdhada phala makku milli solla
geya tuppama nuṇbeneṁbātaṁ bāraṇāsiyo ḷsāsi
raṁ gōbāḷastrī dvijagurugaḷaṁ konda paṁcamahā
pātaka rappar . bahubhirbbasudhā bhuktā rājānāṁ sagarādi
bhiḥ yasyayasya yadā bhūmistasyatasya tadā phalaṁ .
śrī sakulamērugirivolā sasiravikiraṇatatiga
ḷuḷḷannegamo śāsanada silāstaṁbhaṁ bhāsuratara
māgi nilke vasudhātaladoḷ . maṅgaḷa maha śrī .
Digital edition of SII 11.14 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
